title: [CODEREVIEW-1] schema.json oneOf addition for ccp15/ccp16 may miss some v2 vector variants in ccp16-desync.json which uses array root not envelope
description: test/vectors/schema.json:22 - ccp16-desync.json starts with JSON array not object with format_version and vectors; schema validation will fail for it. format_version=2 support incomplete without conditional schema.
